Implement theme system (Light / Dark / System default)

Wires the existing Settings > Theme dropdown to actual visual changes:
- Four CoffeeSettings colour accessors (ThemePanelBg, ThemeTextColor,
  ThemeDimTextColor, ThemeOutlineColor) return palette values per theme
- SyncAllWindows() broadcasts MSG_THEME_CHANGED to all open windows
- Custom Draw() methods (ParticleGaugeView, SieveDistView, CalHistView,
  ExtractionBarView, RoastGaugeView, ThumbView) use theme colours for
  backgrounds, outlines, tick marks, and labels
- BTextView tips areas update view/text colour on MSG_THEME_CHANGED and
  in constructors so newly opened windows inherit the active theme
- Coffee-colour gradients and extraction zone colours are unchanged

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

[Fix] Remove redundant cookies serialization from ProxyMixin (#111)

ProxyMixin.serialize referenced self.cookies but ProxyMixin doesn't
define it — relying on CookieMixin being in the MRO. This would crash
if ProxyMixin were composed without CookieMixin. The block was also
redundant since CookieMixin.serialize already handles cookies.

Co-authored-by: Adam Dobrawy <naczelnik@jawne.info.pl>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: wildcard MITM TLS inspection (#20)

* chore(clawker): updated to node 24

* feat: support wildcard MITM TLS inspection (e.g. *.example.com)

Previously, wildcard domains with inspect:true were silently downgraded
to passthrough because the cert generation couldn't handle * in domain
names. Wildcard certs (e.g. DNS:*.example.com) are standard and cover
single-level subdomains — matching Envoy's server_names behavior.

Changes:
- Remove wildcard-to-passthrough fallback in renderEnvoyConfig()
- Escape * to _wildcard_ in filenames/resource names (filesystem-safe)
- Update HOSTNAME_RE to accept *. prefix in cert generation
- Preserve original domain in CN, SAN, and Envoy server_names

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: harden wildcard MITM validation, deduplicate domain regex

- Extract DOMAIN_VALIDATION_RE and safeFileDomain() to shared
  config/defaults.ts, eliminating duplicated regex/escaping between
  components/envoy.ts and templates/envoy.ts
- Tighten regex to require ≥2 labels (+ not *), rejecting overly broad
  wildcards like *.com that would MITM all .com subdomains
- Add cert validity check: regenerate if corrupt, expiring within 30
  days, or not signed by current CA (replaces simple file-exists guard)
- Add shell metacharacter defense-in-depth assertion before interpolation
- Add 9 new tests: negative wildcard validation (*.com, foo.*.com,
  **.com, *, *com, *.io), multi-level wildcard, key path assertion,
  wildcard passthrough exclusion
- Update EgressRule.dst type comment to document wildcard form

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Add Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA to contact form (#132)

* security: harden email API to prevent spam relay abuse

After a 50K spam email incident via Resend, this commit closes the
attack vectors:

- Add email gateway (email-gateway.ts) with global daily/hourly caps,
  per-recipient limits, circuit breaker, and recipient allowlisting
- Enforce origin check on /api/contact/submit (was commented out)
- Remove user acknowledgement email from contact form (the spam vector
  that sent emails to attacker-supplied addresses)
- Route all email sending through the gateway instead of direct Resend
- Change rate limit fallback from allow-all to deny (fail closed)
- Document new EMAIL_DAILY_LIMIT, EMAIL_HOURLY_LIMIT, and
  EMAIL_ALLOW_USER_EMAILS env vars in env.example

https://claude.ai/code/session_018nmzRZaJ5AjsMegETMeBm6

* fix: resolve TypeScript build error in email gateway type cast

Use double cast (as unknown as ...) for Resend send options to satisfy
strict type checking with the CreateEmailOptions union type.

https://claude.ai/code/session_018nmzRZaJ5AjsMegETMeBm6

* security: mandatory Turnstile CAPTCHA, delete legacy contact route

- Delete /api/contact/route.ts (unused by frontend, unpatched spam
  relay that sent emails to arbitrary user-supplied addresses)
- Add mandatory Cloudflare Turnstile verification to /api/contact/submit
- Add Turnstile widget to ContactForm.tsx (loads script, renders widget,
  sends token with form submission)
- Remove user confirmation email from contact.service.ts (only admin
  notification remains)
- Change verifyTurnstile to fail closed when TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY is
  not configured (was returning true, allowing all requests)
- Add NEXT_PUBLIC_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY to env.example

https://claude.ai/code/session_018nmzRZaJ5AjsMegETMeBm6

feat: migrate object storage from GCS to Cloudflare R2 (#585)

* feat: migrate object storage from GCS to Cloudflare R2

Replace Google Cloud Storage with Cloudflare R2 across the entire stack:

- Core: Add R2 filesystem (s3fs) and DuckDB TYPE r2 secret support with
  backward-compatible aliases (get_gcs_filesystem, get_duckdb_with_gcs)
- Dependencies: Replace gcsfs/google-cloud-storage with s3fs in 13 pyproject.toml files
- Frontend: Update PMTiles URLs from storage.googleapis.com to data.pesticidkortet.dk
- CI/CD: Migrate 23 GitHub Actions workflows from gsutil to aws s3 CLI
- Pipelines: Replace all google.cloud.storage imports with s3fs in 14 pipeline files
- Tests: Add 22 new tests for R2 filesystem, core path normalization, and backward compat
- Path normalization: _strip_protocol() handles both gs:// and r2:// prefixes

commit.message:
fix(build): bypass sccache for build-script probes on macOS

proc-macro2's build script runs feature-detection probes through
RUSTC_WRAPPER. When sccache serves stale cached results from a
different toolchain, the probe incorrectly enables proc_macro_span
on stable Rust, causing `#![feature]` compilation errors.

Skip sccache for any invocation containing --cfg=*build_probe* so
probes always run against the real compiler.

commit.message:
Add per-bin drone removal to foreground chromagram path

Sustained accompaniment (accordion bass, bouzouki drones, guitar pads)
creates constant energy in chroma bins that confuses the classifier.

For each of the 12 chroma bins, compute the temporal median across all
frames and subtract it. This removes any pitch class that is persistently
present (drone/pad) while preserving transient melodic content.

Applied after HPSS in the foreground path: HPSS removes percussion,
drone removal removes sustained accompaniment, leaving the melody.

fix: use STRETCH_KEEP_ASPECT_COVERED for card images

STRETCH_KEEP_ASPECT_CENTERED rendered a square 512x512 image as a tiny
56x56 square centered in the 148x56 slot with empty space on both sides.
STRETCH_KEEP_ASPECT_COVERED fills the full area by scaling to cover then
cropping the overflow — correct card-art behaviour (CSS object-fit:cover).
